section.heading: Purpose

content.p: It is the purpose of this subchapter to provide grants for the encouragement of endowment funds for the operation and improvement of tribally controlled colleges or universities.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 95–471, title III, § 301, as added Pub. L. 98–192, § 13, Dec. 1, 1983, 97 Stat. 1341; amended Pub. L. 105–244, title IX, § 901(b)(6), Oct. 7, 1998, 112 Stat. 1828.)

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1998—Pub. L. 105–244 substituted “colleges or universities” for “community colleges”.

note.heading: Effective Date of 1998 Amendment
note.p: Amendment by Pub. L. 105–244 effective Oct. 1, 1998, except as otherwise provided in Pub. L. 105–244, see section 3 of Pub. L. 105–244, set out as a note under section 1001 of Title 20, Education.
